title: CHILD & FAMILY SERVICES - 211info
text: CREEKSIDE CENTER CHILD & FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, group, and family counseling; school-based counseling; social and behavioral skills training, wraparound services, and psychiatric and psychological evaluations. 1181 SW Ramsey Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Parents and children experiencing mental health issues Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:15pm, Friday 8am-4pm (541) 476-2373 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 476-2373 Main phone Main phone (541) 476-2373 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP and discounted and sliding-scale fees are available. Accepts private insurance on a case-by-case basis. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:15pm, Friday 8am-4pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Family Counseling Individual Counseling * Children Mental Health Evaluation Social Skills Training Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CREEKSIDE CENTER
